summary: test_stop_flips_to_user_when_no_live_background_task exercises real hook.main + _has_live_background_task over 9 no-live-work payloads and asserts client.calls == [("t1","user")]; the fake client only records calls (doesn't decide the turn), so the test fails if the gate wrongly suppresses set_turn or if the turn value were hardcoded to agent.
